description_long: A muscular adult male figure stands upright, displaying a powerful physique with well-defined muscles on the chest, arms, and back. He is bald and wears a set of ornate, metallic armor covering his lower body, including layered armored greaves, a segmented armored skirt, and gauntlets on both forearms. The upper body is bare, revealing detailed anatomical features and a prominent belt with a circular metallic buckle at the waist. The armor has a medieval or fantasy-inspired design, with intricate engravings and a robust, protective appearance. His hands are clenched, and his stance is assertive, suggesting readiness or vigilance.
description: A muscular, bald adult male in ornate lower-body armor and gauntlets, standing upright with a bare torso and assertive posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, abs, and detailed armored skirt with a prominent belt buckle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, and the layered structure of the armored skirt and greaves.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the muscular back, shoulder definition, and the back design of the armored skirt and greaves.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, arm, and the segmented armor details.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy-style armored skirt, greaves, and gauntlets with ornate detailing
